svg.title: LangGraph Autonomous Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Full autonomous agent engine showing supervisor, planner, executor, reflection, memory, and tool nodes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes into the Input Router node of a LangGraph agent?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Supervisor / Orchestrator node role in an autonomous LangGraph agent')
sendPrompt('How does a Planner node work in LangChain LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('What memory types should a LangGraph agent have?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Executor node and sub-agents in LangGraph')
g.text: Parallel task dispatch · Tool calls · API hits

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools should a LangGraph autonomous agent have access to?')
sendPrompt('How to integrate code execution into a LangGraph agent?')
sendPrompt('How does a LangGraph agent use file and database tools?')
sendPrompt('What external APIs should a LangGraph agent integrate?')
sendPrompt('How does a Reflection Critic node improve LangGraph agent quality?')
sendPrompt('What should the Output Synthesizer do in a LangGraph agent?')
sendPrompt('How to implement human-in-the-loop interrupt checkpoints in LangGraph?')
